channel.title: Posts on Chicken Scratch & Code - a blog by Michelle Zelechoski
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Chicken Scratch & Code - a blog by Michelle Zelechoski

item.title: Site Under Construction
item.description: This site is under construction, but ultimately it will be a place for me to talk about my coding journey, about my transition from working as a full-time artist to working in tech, and about other things going on in my life (including my chickens).
